title: 12pcs Christmas Kraft Paper Bags, 4 Styles Extra Large Reindeer Santa Snowman Gift Candy Treat Goody Bags with Handles for Xmas Party Favor Decorations (12)
features: Great Extra Large Gift Bag: You will get 12 Extra Large Christmas Gift Bags in 4 designs, 3 of each design, which is enough for many needs. You can give your best friend or family member a gift in this beautiful bag to make them feel extra warm at Christmas.

Large Size: The size of this Christmas paper bag is 20*15* 7 inches/51*38*18 cm, suitable for large gift wrapping, you can pack candies, snacks, toys and big gifts for Christmas and so on. Gifting with these cute paper bags is not only eco-friendly, but also creates a joyful Christmas atmosphere for you.

Premium Material: The Christmas Kraft paper bag is made of quality thick Kraft paper, beautiful, safe and environmentally friendly, easy to use, reusable, solid bag handle, flat bottom, not easy to damage or drop halfway. Putting presents in a bag will give children more surprises and is a good choice for your Christmas gift.

Christmas Design: The Xmas gift bag uses a unique holiday element theme design, adding a variety of beautiful snowflakes, Christmas trees, plaid and Christmas ornaments pattern, the overall color system is also more suitable for Christmas style. The beautiful pattern on the bag makes gift-giving easier and perfect, making it an ideal wrapping decoration for Christmas.

Widely Used: This Christmas goody bag is suitable for a variety of occasions, you can use it to wrap Christmas party gifts, Christmas gift packaging, Christmas decorations, wine bottle gift packaging, friend gift bags, hospitality bags. You can also use them as New Year shopping bags to add atmosphere and joy to your Christmas!
description: From the brand Advent Calendar 2025 You can start from the 1st, open one in order each day, and get a different Decorations every day. Previous page Christmas Countdown Calendar Christmas decorations Christmas decorations Next page
